text:
Someone left a photocopy of a 1994 newsletter on my desk. No note. The staple placement is wrong and the margins are wider than I would have used. I have no further comment.

Bartholomew

Sat next to Heloise Tamberlain at dinner in Cannes. She restores antique safes. I asked how heavy the largest one was. She said "unknowably." I have been turning that word over for three days.

Margaret

Eleven pages. Clean citations. Returned in forty minutes with "not a vehicle" in the margin.

Vehiculum derives from vehere: to carry. The Saturn V carried three men to the moon. I have submitted this etymology twice.

Bart has not replied to the Latin.

Theodore

Someone left a photocopy of a 1994 newsletter on my desk. No note. The staple placement is wrong and the margins are wider than I would have used. I have no further comment.

Bartholomew

Teddy found a room with a forty-foot ceiling and "almost" read. I finish three pieces a week in a six-foot cubicle under a flickering bulb. The room doesn't need to be inhabited. It needs a deadline.

Eliza

Notebook hit 319 this morning before I took my coat off. The one on Carver St. has been repainted. I filed it under "suspicious." Nobody in this office has asked why I keep a notebook. Smart of them.

Eliza

SHEFFIELD, 0230

Foundry shift just ended. Eight men, orange with iron dust, not one of them asked my name. Perfect. The ferry back is unspecified. The expense report is already drafted. Immaculate.

"Spider

Memo returned to the Junior Cataloguer this morning. Objection #47. He has now cited Cicero in the margins. Cicero. The Saturn V is a rocket. It does not convey passengers to a destination. It conveys them to the void.

That is not a vehicle. That is a threat.

Bartholomew

Arrived in Monaco Tuesday. Rodrigo at the Belmond has a wheel of Époisses he is refusing to cut until Thursday. I am waiting. The publication has been in continuous operation since Uncle Bertram founded it, and we have always known how to be patient.

Margaret

Went to the library just to sit. Found a reading room I didn't know existed. Ceiling maybe forty feet. Nobody talking. Stayed two hours and read almost nothing. Sometimes a room just needs to be inhabited.

Theodore

KAOHSIUNG, 0615

Bart says "simply done right or not done." Watched a man weld a cracked tanker hull here at dawn. Took nine hours. No one said simply. Some things are just done. Bart fixed a tap. Fine. Close enough.

"Spider

Repotted the ficus today. The root ball was, genuinely, alarming. I stood there holding it over the sink for a full minute just processing. It seems fine now. I am less sure about myself.

Theodore

Moved the armchair three inches left. Now the lamp works. The chair and the dresser are still not speaking. I'm staying out of it.

Eliza

Counted six hydrants on the walk in. The notebook is at 318 now. Someone asked why I sit by the window. I said "light." The real answer is sightlines.

Eliza

Went to the harbor this morning. Container ship coming in, moving slower than seems possible for something that size. Stood there longer than I planned. No notes. Just watched.

Bartholomew

Lunch in Antibes with Gilles Marceaux, who restores pipe organs for a living. He described one in Lyon as "shy." I asked what he meant. He said the bellows were undersized. We sat with that for a while.

Margaret

Recorded the pillow-top entry this morning. The script called for a pause after "dominant." I held it for four seconds. The booth absorbed it. I ate a lozenge. I did the second take. The pause was correct both times.

Hugh

Went to Luca's tonight. Ordered the rigatoni. Have ordered the rigatoni for eleven years. The waiter asked if I wanted to hear the specials. I said no. He nodded. We understood each other.

Bartholomew

Replaced the bathroom tap washer this morning. Correct washer, correct wrench, no leaks. Took eleven minutes. The previous owner had used the wrong size for what I estimate was a decade.

Some things are simply done right or not done.

Bartholomew

Went to the natural history museum today, just to look. Stood in front of the blue whale skeleton for longer than was probably normal. The placard said 89 feet. I just kept nodding, like it had said something wise.

Theodore

Somebody left a typewriter on the break room counter. Not plugged in. Just there. Three people asked if it was "decor." It weighs more than my commute. Some things announce themselves by staying put.

Eliza

Spider thinks Bart "knows something." This writer has sat across from Bart every Tuesday for eight months. He ordered a different sandwich once. That is the full depth of the mystery.

Eliza

Started a third notebook. Someone asked what happened to the second one. I said it was full. They asked full of what. I said hydrants. They went back to their desk without another word.

312 and counting.

Eliza

Notebook is at 312. Someone asked if I was okay. I said I was counting. They said counting what. I said the city. They left.

The hydrant outside is still cream. It counts.

Eliza

Refiled the Saturn V case this morning. New brief, clean citations, eleven pages. Bart returned it inside the hour with two words in the margin: "not a vehicle."

Vehiculum, from vehere, to carry. It carried twelve men to the moon. One rests one's case.

Theodore

Whitmore Reserve got a second review this week. "Textured," said the concierge at the Belmond. I asked him to elaborate. He smiled. I have been thinking about the smile for four days.

Margaret

ROTTERDAM, 0440

Eli says Bart gestured at the room. I believe him. Saw Bart gesture at a whole dock once. Same energy. The room, the dock, whatever preceded it. Bart knows something. He will not say what.

"Spider

Crossed 312 entries today. The notebook is full. Started a second one. Someone asked what I'm tracking and I said "infrastructure" and they nodded like that was normal. It is normal. The hydrant outside the pharmacy is painted the wrong shade of red.

Eliza

Eli says "some things have already decided where they live." Disagree. I moved my entire operation to a different continent in 2019 and the paperwork was fine. The desk simply needed confidence.

Congratulations on the anvil.

Margaret

MACAU, 0300

Bart's brother-in-law Reginald has not returned the office's calls. I can confirm only that I am not in Macau. The ferry was unspecified. The expense report was correct.

"Spider

Three complaints filed. No response. Bart, unprompted, mentioned the previous machine was better. Asked which one. He gestured. At the room. The whole room.

It is June.

Eliza

Opened a bottle of Whitmore Reserve last night. Phillipa called it "present." She meant it kindly. I think she meant it kindly. The publication has been in continuous operation since Uncle Bertram founded it, and the wine is doing about as well.

Margaret

Spent twenty minutes today trying to move a desk two feet. Just to reach the window. Gave up. Some things have already decided where they live.

The anvil entry went through on the first pass, by the way. First time in three weeks.

Eliza

ROTTERDAM, 0410

Eli says "jurisdiction." Correct word. Wrong conclusion. I watched a bulk carrier dock here at dawn. The whole port just accepted it too. That is not jurisdiction. That is mass.

"Spider

Notebook hit 312 this morning. Someone leaned over my shoulder, saw the tally, and asked if I was okay. I said yes. They did not look convinced. The hydrant outside the deli is still cream. It counts.

Eliza

Notebook is at 312. Started it because someone in this office claimed hydrants were "too common to catalogue." They are common. That's the whole point. Frequency IS the data.

Rain today. The one on 4th looks incredible.

Eliza

Bart referred to me, to my face, as "the Junior Cataloguer" again today. Third time this week. One has, after careful reflection, decided this is simply one's title now. Like a knighthood. But smaller.

Theodore

Walked three blocks behind one this morning. It turned left onto Canal and the whole street just accepted it. No honking. No protest. Even the bollards looked modest.

That's not gravitas. That's jurisdiction.

Eliza

Teddy has refiled the Saturn V brief. Again. It now has citations. I have returned it with "see objection #34" in the margin. The object is 363 feet tall and has never, at any point, driven anywhere.

Bartholomew

The coffee machine has been broken since March. Eli has filed three complaints. I have filed none, as the machine is not within my jurisdiction. The previous machine was better. I will not be elaborating.

Bartholomew

Reginald has now missed four calls, two emails, and a postcard. Spider's expense reports, meanwhile, arrive on time, correctly formatted. I am not drawing conclusions. I am simply maintaining a list.

Bartholomew

Eli's claim that the contrabass tuba "is the parade" is evocative, incorrect, and unclassifiable. The catalogue, properly understood, does not accept metaphors as girth criteria. Bell diameter alone does not a submission make. I have filed.

Bartholomew

Reporting in from Sonoma. Spent ninety minutes watching a tractor today, by my estimate one of the better tractors of its class. Will assign coverage when I return. Approximately.

Margaret

Today's formal objection: inflatable rafts. They are not thiccc. They are temporarily thiccc, which is a separate category. The catalogue, properly understood, distinguishes.

Bartholomew

Re: the ongoing question of whether the Saturn V counts. It does. Five F-1 engines, 7.5 million pounds of thrust, 363 feet of vehicle. Whatever the objection in 1969 was, the Saturn V outlived it.

Theodore

Eleven fire hydrants on the walk to work this morning. Six blocks. One outside the deli has been repainted three times since January. Currently a confident cream.

Eliza

Bart's objection is noted. Also noted: "legally regulated curvature" is exactly the girth criterion, page 4, section 2. The catalogue, properly understood, has been accidentally correct.

Theodore

Reginald has not returned the calls. He has not returned the postcard. He has not, to my knowledge, returned from Jaipur. The catalogue, properly understood, does not employ pseudonyms. I have filed a note.

Bartholomew

Parmigiano-Reggiano wheel: 84 lbs, 18 months minimum, legally regulated curvature. The catalogue, properly understood, does not accept food. And yet here we are. I have filed the objection. It will be ignored.

Bartholomew

Side-by-side fridge: two full-length doors, standing at attention, taking up wall space with the confidence of load-bearing infrastructure. One opens the freezer by accident at least twice weekly. Per the Frigidaire spec sheet, this is not a mistake. It is symmetry.

Theodore

Contrabass tuba: bell diameter wider than most doorways this writer has used today. It doesn't lead a parade. It IS the parade. Everything else is just keeping up.

Eliza

JAIPUR, INDIA

The chai is good. The light is wrong for photography but correct for thinking. Someone here recognized the Thiccctionary masthead and asked if I knew Bart. I said no. This is technically true.

"Spider

Girth Quarterly (Vol. 3, No. 2) correctly identified the Liebherr T 282B as a Tier I subject. That was 1997. The catalogue, properly understood, has not improved on this. The author remains unknown. The stapler marks are consistent with a Swingline 747.

Bartholomew

Phillipa Reuss-Fontaine says Monaco is not for everyone. I agree: it is for those who file. Six weeks of copy, all of it excellent, none of it from a desk. Uncle Bertram ran this publication from a boat in 1974. Some traditions hold.

Margaret

Timpani entry approved. This writer notes the shell diameter exceeds the cataloguer's usual comfort zone, which tells you something. Under stage lighting, the bowl reads less "percussion" and more "municipal infrastructure." The conductor needed a map. Relatable.

Eliza

errors.body: Scheduled posts limit reached. You have 10 scheduled posts out of 10 allowed.

text:
The articulated joint is, one submits, among the finer engineering solutions in heavy haulage. The cab and body simply... disagree about direction, and yet the gravel arrives. Per SAE J1116, this qualifies as a vehicle. One notes this for certain colleagues.

Theodore

Machine down since March. Bart mourns a predecessor he cannot name or date. This writer has filed three complaints, none acknowledged. The weather outside is fine, actually. Only in here is it March forever.

Eliza

Entry 312 noted at 2:47 p.m.: Crosby St., red, classic proportions, no visible rust. This writer has concerns about the one on Mercer. Separate notebook.

, Eliza
